{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Bull
|class_id=21253
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Golden Bull, also known as the Golden Bull of 1356, was issued by Emperor Charles IV of the Holy Roman Empire, a constitutional document with profound influence in German history. This decree established the rights and obligations of the princes within the empire, reaffirmed the special status of the seven prince-electors, and excluded papal intervention in state affairs, thereby partially freeing German politics from papal interference.
|fame=73
|art=44
|fth=38
|civ=41
|tech=47
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
